title: ID-COOLING IS-53-XT Black Low Profile CPU Cooler 53mm Height, 4 Heatpipes, 92mm PWM Fan, All-Black Design, Compatible with Intel LGA1851/1700/1200/115X & AMD AM5/AM4
features: 【Ultra-Low Profile Design】Only 53mm in total height, perfect for small form factor builds and compact cases.
【Compact Size, Perfect Compatibility】With dimensions of 94×94×53mm, this cooler fits seamlessly in mini-ITX and HTPC systems.
【Sleek All-Black Minimalist Look】Premium pure black coating with a simple, elegant design that enhances any build aesthetic.
【Excellent Compatibility & Clearance】Smart layout ensures no interference with memory or rear I/O, offering maximum flexibility in tight spaces.
【Superior Cooling Performance】Features 4 high-efficiency heatpipes and a solid copper base for rapid heat transfer and better CPU cooling.
【Enhanced Fin Structure】Fin stack with interlocking design increases surface area and ensures structural stability without deformation.
【Powerful 92mm PWM Fan】High-performance 92×92×17mm fan with speed range 800–3000RPM, delivering up to 47.5CFM airflow and 2.37mmH2O static pressure for effective heat dissipation.
【Easy Installation, Wide Compatibility】Supports Intel LGA1851/1700/1200/115X and AMD AM5/AM4 sockets for effortless mounting on popular platforms.
description: ID-COOLING IS-53-XT Black Low Profile CPU Cooler 53mm Height, 4 Heatpipes, 92mm PWM Fan, All-Black Design, Compatible with Intel LGA1851/1700/1200/115X & AMD AM5/AM4
